..label: spruce duff underfoot · quiet · you can hear the ocean two ridges over

T.label: an old Sitka spruce · older than the camp · older than the country

b.label: salal and huckleberry, chest-high · not walkable

R.label: a mossy boulder · a chipmunk sits on top of it and does not move

H.label: a small hunter's cabin · shuttered · nobody has been here since spring

N.label: a note tacked to the cabin door · handwriting · read it

G.label: a small stone marker set upright in the moss · Portuguese carved into the stone

c.label: a driftwood cross on the grave · weathered but standing

p.label: the deer trail back toward camp · you should not be here

notes: The east forest · off-limits to campers · a small hunter's cabin at center-north (shuttered · a handwritten note tacked to the door, dated in a year that hasn't happened yet), a Portuguese sailor's grave at center-south (1873, one of the Ana Faustina's crew who walked up the beach and did not make it home), old-growth Sitka spruce, salal and huckleberry brush.  Reachable through a deer trail at the north-east corner of camp path.  Nika's SNEAK avoids the counselors noticing.  Anyone else in party · Bear catches them and the party is asked to go back.
